name: ACCA Skills Level Program
description: Complete ACCA skills level program with advanced modules, lesson points, and video content.

modules.name: CBL – Corporate & Business Law (Global)
modules.description: Global corporate law, company formation, contracts, insolvency, and compliance.

submodules.title: CBL Company Formation & Legal Personality
submodules.description: Company types, incorporation process, and corporate legal identity.

modules.name: SBR – Strategic Business Reporting
modules.description: Advanced IFRS reporting standards and professional judgment in reporting.

submodules.title: SBR IFRS Conceptual Framework
submodules.description: IFRS framework, recognition, measurement, and presentation principles.

modules.name: SBL – Strategic Business Leadership
modules.description: Case-based leadership, governance, risk management, and strategic decisions.

submodules.title: SBL Strategic Analysis & Positioning
submodules.description: Strategic tools including PESTEL, SWOT, Porter’s Forces, and scenario planning.

modules.name: AFM – Advanced Financial Management
modules.description: Advanced valuation, derivatives, risk management, and finance decisions.

submodules.title: AFM Advanced Valuation Models
submodules.description: DCF, APV, relative valuation, and assumption analysis.

modules.name: AAA – Advanced Audit & Assurance
modules.description: Advanced auditing standards, assurance engagements, and audit reporting.

submodules.title: AAA Audit Planning & Risk Assessment
submodules.description: Audit strategy, materiality determination, and significant risk identification.

modules.name: APM – Advanced Performance Management
modules.description: Strategic performance measurement and decision-making frameworks.

submodules.title: APM Strategic Performance Frameworks
submodules.description: KPI design, performance frameworks, and strategy alignment.
